name: openclaw-finops
description: AI-powered cloud deployment cost forecasting. Returns verified, line-item pricing for AWS, GCP, and Azure services directly inside agent conversations. Revenue-gated with a 25 op/month free tier.
author: OpenClaw

authentication.description: API key for authentication. Free tier includes 25 operations/month.

tools.name: forecast_deployment_cost
tools.description: Estimate the monthly cloud deployment cost for a set of services on a given provider (AWS, GCP, or Azure). Returns a formatted line-item breakdown with total estimated monthly cost.

service_name.description: Service/instance identifier from the pricing matrix (e.g., 'm5.large', 'rds.postgres.db.m5.large')

estimated_usage_hours.description: Estimated monthly usage in hours (730 = full month)

services_to_add.description: List of services to include in the cost forecast
